title: Managing E-Mail Lists - "Unsubscribe" functionality

posts.author: BGK0311 (Bernd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am using monday to collect contacts / E-Mail addresses and to send out a sequence of onboarding emails to those email adresses.
I would like to offer every contact to “unsubscribe” from the thread automatically again - setting a flag for deletion to this contact. and onboarding e-mails.

Any idea how this could be acomplished?

Thank you !
Bernd

posts.author: tself (Timothy Self)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue/question. Did you ever learn anything?

posts.author: AHN-Marco (Marco Ertelt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same issue here.
Is there a way to add an unsubscribe button to a mass mailing?
